surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal hook change: a SessionStart crash-guard + an extension of the ensure_shared_cache self-heal to cover cache/shipwright/plugins/. No target-app runtime surface; the fs boundary (mirror installed dirs -> cache/plugins) is exercised end-to-end by the integration test running the real hook as a subprocess, and the guard by the degraded-import unit test.

behaviors.behavior: ensure_shared_cache heals BOTH shared/ (from the clone) and plugins/ (from installed dirs) on a fresh install
plugins/ heals from the installed versioned dirs even with NO marketplace clone
idempotent no-op when shared/ and plugins/ are both present
fail-open (exit 0) + shared/ guidance when neither a clone nor shipwright-run is available
no-op in the --plugin-dir dev model (both dirs are the real repo)
phase_session_start.run() returns 0 (standalone) when the cross-plugin lifecycle import degraded to None — never a NoneType-not-callable crash
the vendored ensure_shared_cache stays byte-identical across all 12 hook-bearing plugins + registered first in SessionStart
extracting the context-block builders to phase_context_blocks.py preserves the pipeline-context + BLOCKED-variant emission
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_phase_session_hooks.py (happy-path emits pipeline block; wrong-skill/terminal/duplicate/prereq emit the BLOCKED block) — 18 pass
